name: Let's Boogie
short_description: Use your power to swap places to complete stages as fast as you can in this speedrun platformer!
detailed_description:
You've been summoned by a mysterious cult with limited powers. Use what you have to fight your way through the cult in this speed running platformer!

You have the power to swap with any object which isn't tied down! Use this unique skill to complete stages as fast as you can!

Features:
  • Speedrun timer
  • 26 Levels
  • 15 Hidden collectables
  • Bonus level, live as long as you can!

Are you the strongest because you are a demon, or are you a demon because you are the strongest?
